To develop a function that calculates the cumulative sum of all numerical values within a list of tuples, we must first consider the structure of the input. The function should be designed to handle nested tuples and extract only the numeric elements, ignoring any non-numeric values. This process involves recursively traversing through each element in the tuple structure, checking for numeric types, and accumulating the sum accordingly. The function should be flexible enough to process various levels of nesting without any limitations.
